era1_nation_building.name: Nation-Building
era1_nation_building.description: Build the foundations of a modern state from imperial rubble. Your choices about institutions, infrastructure, and ethnic relations will echo for a century.
key_mechanics: Language policy: which groups can access state jobs
Central bank: build early for monetary sovereignty
Education: invest in mass literacy or elite universities

legacy_creation.institutional_dna: HIGH — foundations laid here persist forever
legacy_creation.infrastructure_backbone: HIGH — rail gauge and road network are 100-year path dependencies
legacy_creation.ethnic_relations: HIGH — accommodation or conflict patterns set for generations
legacy_creation.human_capital_base: MEDIUM — literacy investments compound across eras

era2_planned_development.name: Planned Development
era2_planned_development.description: Industrialize rapidly under external geopolitical alignment. Your autonomy is constrained — you can shape how industrialization happens, but not whether it happens.
key_mechanics: Industrial targeting: heavy industry vs. consumer goods
Urbanization management: planned cities vs. chaotic growth
Suppressed tensions: era 1 ethnic issues accumulate as invisible pressure
Human capital: vocational training vs. academic education

legacy_creation.industrial_structure: HIGH — determines transition difficulty in era 3
legacy_creation.urban_systems: HIGH — cities built now determine era 3 urban form
legacy_creation.environmental_damage: HIGH — accumulated pollution becomes era 3 cost
legacy_creation.human_capital_profile: HIGH — skills mix determines era 3 adaptability
legacy_creation.suppressed_tensions: HIGH — stored pressure releases in era 3 transition

era3_convergence.name: Convergence or Drift
era3_convergence.description: The system collapses. Your inherited industrial structure is now a liability. Suppressed tensions release. You have full policy autonomy — and full accountability. The EU accession track offers a structured convergence path.
key_mechanics: Market transition: shock therapy vs. gradualism
EU accession: structured convergence with external discipline
Deindustrialization: manage decline of era 2 heavy industry
Brain circulation: diaspora return vs. permanent drain
Environmental cleanup: era 2 pollution legacy costs
Pressure release: era 1+2 ethnic tensions surface

external_constraints.eu_conditionality: if on accession track: policy constraints + funding

scoring.prosperity: GDP per capita (PPP), Gini coefficient, poverty rate
scoring.resilience: Economic diversification, fiscal health, institutional depth
scoring.human_development: Life expectancy, education years, gender equality
scoring.sustainability: Carbon intensity, environmental health, renewable share
scoring.convergence: Distance to EU-15 average across all dimensions

era1_to_era2.description: Geopolitical realignment is imposed externally. Policy autonomy drops from 100% to 30%. Existing institutions persist but operate under new constraints.

era2_to_era3.description: The planned economy collapses. Policy autonomy returns to 100%. Industrial structure becomes a liability. Stored ethnic tensions release.
reset: gdp_per_capita_ppp (shock adjustment: -15% to -35% depending on industrial structure)
